---
title: "Outbreaks"
---

Select an outbreak below to view the latest evidence surveillance table and download the current dataset.

Each outbreak has its own folder, downloadable CSV and full dataset XLSX file. Columns may differ between outbreaks depending on surveillance needs.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Hantavirus

Evidence surveillance data and background information for Hantavirus literature.

<a href="outbreaks/hantavirus/background/" class="btn btn-primary">Background</a>

<a href="outbreaks/hantavirus/" class="btn btn-primary">View evidence</a>

<a href="outbreaks/hantavirus/transient-info" class="btn btn-primary">Transient Information</a>
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Bundibugyo Ebolavirus

Evidence surveillance data for Bundibugyo Ebolavirus literature.

<a href="outbreaks/bundibugyo-ebola/background/" class="btn btn-primary">Background</a>

<a href="outbreaks/bundibugyo-ebola/" class="btn btn-primary">View evidence</a>

<a href="outbreaks/bundibugyo-ebola/transient-info" class="btn btn-primary">Transient Information</a>
:::

:::
